allow: Bash(python3 -c "import zipfile; z = zipfile.ZipFile\('src/assets/International Space Station.zip'\); print\('\\n'.join\(z.namelist\(\)\)\)")
Bash(node -e "const fs=require\('fs'\); const path=require\('path'\); const AdmZip=require\('adm-zip'\); ")

Bash(powershell -Command "Add-Type -Assembly System.IO.Compression.FileSystem; [System.IO.Compression.ZipFile]::OpenRead\('src/assets/International Space Station.zip'\).Entries | Select-Object FullName")
